steps.title: Identify the criticism
steps.content: Text 2 says Reyes and Chen object to treating lithium and other individual elements as clear signs of Earth-like continental crust. They argue that other minerals or rock types could also explain those elements.

steps.title: Describe the likely response
steps.content: Choice A invents a prior belief that such exoplanets lack crusts. Choice B says the field has only just begun, and choice D says element detection is unusual; neither appears in Text 2. Reyes and Chen would call Text 1's conclusion insufficiently supported. The answer is C.
